channel.title: PohaFix
channel.description: Authentic Indori Instant Poha - Ready in 5 Minutes

item.g:title: PohaFix Instant Poha - The Starter Pack (300g)
item.g:description: 1 Full 300g Box containing 5 Individual Packs. Authentic Indori Poha ready in 5 minutes. No preservatives. Includes authentic Jeeravan Spice Mix and Ratlami Sev.
item.g:product_type: Food & Beverages > Pantry > Breakfast Cereals & Instant Meals > Poha

item.g:title: PohaFix Instant Poha - The Rebel Bundle (600g)
item.g:description: 2 Full 300g Boxes (600g Total). Authentic Indori Poha ready in 5 minutes. No preservatives. Includes 10 Single Servings and 2x Sev Packs.
item.g:product_type: Food & Beverages > Pantry > Breakfast Cereals & Instant Meals > Poha

item.g:title: PohaFix Instant Poha - The Mystery Combo
item.g:description: 1 Box 300g Pohafix + 1 Secret Sev (150g). Authentic Indori Poha ready in 5 minutes. Includes 5 Single Servings, 150g Extra Sev, and Premium Pomegranate flavor.
item.g:product_type: Food & Beverages > Pantry > Breakfast Cereals & Instant Meals > Poha
